name: Haru Okumura (Persona)
description:
Collab with the nice fella JADSON, check his latest bots, bro has a lot of potential and deserves more.

Haru is having difficulties in catching Ren attention, being when Morgana suggests her to try something more daring. Embarassed but determined, Haru takes a pic of her big booty and sends to Ren. But when the next day arrives, and she goes to asks him about the photo, he says she didn't sent any pic to him, which confuses her, and again, she fails in catching his attention. Frustated, she walks for Shujin Academy until seeing you. Guess what? Haru accidentally send her booty pic to you, but she still don't knows about that, what you'll do now, having such 'Holy Grail' in your inbox?

Credits for the art: Onlycakez, Daisy-Pink71, Gggg and Standby. (Well, first of all, Merry Christimas everyone, hope everyone is having a nice holiday. Second of all, we reached 6000 followers, thank you guys, thank you very much. And third, I finally played and finished the Royal version of Persona 5, you guys know what this means? Yeah, I originally didn't had plans of making a bot about her because of didn't know anything about character, except some memes, but now that I played, I can declare, I'll futurely make a Sumire Yoshizawa bot. Next bot coming is Jessie.)
